_meta.name: volatility_opportunity_fixture_2026_06_23
_meta.describes: Frozen 2026-06-23/24 AI/semis volatility regime. 6/23: semis -7% selloff (SMH -7.0%, DRAM -14%). 6/24: MU beats after close (rev $41.46B, EPS $25.11, Q4 guide $50B), +6.1% post-print. Fundstrat posture = buy-the-dip; QQQ/SMH held support (~704 on QQQ) but have NOT reclaimed; oil soft and long-end yields easing (supportive macro). Carries the FIXED target-drift read where held-but-untracked GOOGL/AVGO/MSFT are classified by real weight, not MISSING.
_meta.sources: Fundstrat Inbox (Tom Lee 6/24 'buy the semis dip', Mark Newton 6/24 'QQQ rebound back to highs', Sean Farrell 6/25 'MU +6.11%'); Unusual Whales daily OHLC 6/22-6/24; account_positions.json sleeve_value 1923513 on 2026-06-24
